from unittest.mock import Mock
from typing import Any

import pytest


def get_user(user_id: int) -> dict:
    return {"id": user_id, "name": "John", "email": "john@example.com"}


def get_user_count() -> int:
    return 42


class TestUserFunctions:
    def test_get_user_returns_dict(self):
        mock_get_user = Mock(return_value={"id": 1, "name": "Jane", "email": "jane@example.com"})
        result = mock_get_user(1)
        assert isinstance(result, dict)
        assert result["name"] == "Jane"

    def test_get_user_count_returns_int(self):
        mock_count = Mock(return_value=42)
        result = mock_count()
        assert isinstance(result, int)
        assert result == 42

    def test_process_user(self):
        mock_fetch = Mock(return_value={"id": 1, "status": "active"})
        result = mock_fetch(1)
        assert result["status"] == "active"
